verses.text: He measures the temple — the holy place and 'the most holy place' beyond. Exact dimensions. God's dwelling is ordered to the inmost room where His presence rests.
He measures the temple — the holy place and 'the most holy place' beyond. Exact dimensions. God's dwelling is ordered to the inmost room where His presence rests.
He measures the temple — the holy place and 'the most holy place' beyond. Exact dimensions. God's dwelling is ordered to the inmost room where His presence rests.
He measures the temple — the holy place and 'the most holy place' beyond. Exact dimensions. God's dwelling is ordered to the inmost room where His presence rests.
He measures the wall and the side chambers, three stories rising round the house. Surrounding rooms. God's house has place for many uses, all built about His sanctuary.
He measures the wall and the side chambers, three stories rising round the house. Surrounding rooms. God's house has place for many uses, all built about His sanctuary.
He measures the wall and the side chambers, three stories rising round the house. Surrounding rooms. God's house has place for many uses, all built about His sanctuary.
The foundation, breadth, and doors of the chambers are measured. Solid base. What is built for God rests on careful, lasting foundations.
The foundation, breadth, and doors of the chambers are measured. Solid base. What is built for God rests on careful, lasting foundations.
The foundation, breadth, and doors of the chambers are measured. Solid base. What is built for God rests on careful, lasting foundations.
The foundation, breadth, and doors of the chambers are measured. Solid base. What is built for God rests on careful, lasting foundations.
The building westward and the breadth of the house and its court are measured. Spacious order. Every part has its appointed proportion.
The building westward and the breadth of the house and its court are measured. Spacious order. Every part has its appointed proportion.
The building westward and the breadth of the house and its court are measured. Spacious order. Every part has its appointed proportion.
He measures the galleries, porch, and windows, all panelled with wood to the ground. Adorned within. God's house is finished with beauty as well as strength.
He measures the galleries, porch, and windows, all panelled with wood to the ground. Adorned within. God's house is finished with beauty as well as strength.
He measures the galleries, porch, and windows, all panelled with wood to the ground. Adorned within. God's house is finished with beauty as well as strength.
It is carved with cherubims and palm trees, each cherub with a man's and a lion's face. Symbols of glory. The angels and the palms of victory deck the place of worship.
It is carved with cherubims and palm trees, each cherub with a man's and a lion's face. Symbols of glory. The angels and the palms of victory deck the place of worship.
It is carved with cherubims and palm trees, each cherub with a man's and a lion's face. Symbols of glory. The angels and the palms of victory deck the place of worship.
The posts are square, the altar of wood, and the doors are double. Fitting furniture. Even the altar and doors are made to God's pattern.
The posts are square, the altar of wood, and the doors are double. Fitting furniture. Even the altar and doors are made to God's pattern.
The posts are square, the altar of wood, and the doors are double. Fitting furniture. Even the altar and doors are made to God's pattern.
The doors have two leaves each, carved with cherubims and palm trees. Repeated beauty. The same holy emblems adorn the whole sanctuary.
The doors have two leaves each, carved with cherubims and palm trees. Repeated beauty. The same holy emblems adorn the whole sanctuary.
